title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.040 - Parties to action
text:
524.040.  Parties to action. — The action shall be prosecuted in the real names of the parties thereto, and shall be brought against the person in possession of the premises claimed.
(RSMo 1939 § 1532) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1368; 1919 § 1818; 1909 § 2385 
Holder under tax deed may sue for recovery of possession, when, 140.580
